perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) This is a live-action video. A young woman wearing a white lace top and a black and white patterned bucket hat stands in a Costco warehouse aisle, holding two 'Honey Pods' gift boxes. She smiles and gestures toward the products. (2) She moves closer to the camera to show the details of a lavender-colored box with a white bear plush and a floral blanket, pointing at the texture and the carrying handle. (3) The scene cuts to her showing a pink rabbit-themed box and then a blue lamb-themed box, rotating them to show the packaging. (4) She holds the purple bear box again, gives a thumbs-up with her right hand, and waves toward the camera as she concludes.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic background music starts immediately. A female voice speaks in a fast-paced, high-pitched, and enthusiastic tone in Mandarin. (2) The narrator's voice remains constant and cheerful, detailing the price and the contents of the gift set (plush toy, blanket, and pouch). (3) The sound of the warehouse environment is mostly filtered out, though subtle ambient echoes of a large space are present. (4) The music and narration maintain their tempo until the end, concluding with a final recommendation.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Large, colorful 'hook' text overlays appear at the top and middle: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE', '三合一只要449元' (3-in-1 for only 449 yuan), '超美花卉布偶寶寶毯' (Super beautiful floral plush baby blanket), and '超不傷荷包' (Very wallet-friendly). These have an exciting and promotional tone. (2) White functional subtitles appear at the bottom, translating the narrator's detailed description of the product features and different designs. Tone is informative.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Product Feature Close-up -> Variety Showcase -> Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female presenter is the only person visible.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long hair, wearing a white lace off-the-shoulder top and a black/white patterned bucket hat.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a Costco warehouse store, with high industrial ceilings and metal shelving units stacked with consumer goods.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a shopping recommendation and product review. It aims to inform viewers about a specific value-for-money gift set (Honey Pods 3-piece set) found at Costco, emphasizing its affordability, aesthetic design, and suitability as a gift for children.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The presenter explicitly names the store (Costco), shows the product packaging and brand clearly, mentions the specific low price, and gives a positive recommendation.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Fast-paced 'shopping guide' style narration common in East Asian short-form content.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video targets budget-conscious parents or gift-buyers, using high-density text and an enthusiastic persona to create a sense of 'must-buy' urgency.
